name: Ocal Browser V7.0.00
body:
OCAL BROWSER - UPDATE CATALOG
Version: 7.0.00 Stable
Release Date: June 27, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[MAJOR RELEASE v7.0.00]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* VISUAL POLISH & TRANSITIONS: Redesigned the start page central clock with a large modern typography layout, ambient accent halos, and a smooth opacity-only colon pulsing animation. Disables text selection globally on Home and Settings pages for an immersive app experience.
* GLASSMORPHIC SETTINGS DESIGN: Overhauled the Settings panel and all its subcomponents (Search Engine Selectors, Homepage Configuration preview, Profile Grid, System Diagnostics, and Inputs) to feature frosted translucency, backdrop blur, accent hover glows, and rounded margins.
* CORE SETTINGS EXTENSION: Configured a dark monospaced shell terminal console in light/dark themes, clean solid diagnostics grids, and interactive hover properties on close confirmation tabs.
* iOS-STYLE TOGGLE SWITCHES: Implemented elastic switches with interactive stretching animations on active press.
* SAFARI SMOOTH SCROLLING: Integrated touch-pad and mouse wheel kinetic inertial scrolling.
* CHROMIUM ENGINE UPGRADE: Upgraded base browser shell to Electron v42.5.0 (Chromium v148).
* EXTENSIONS UPDATE: Bundled latest stable releases of uBlock Origin (v1.71.0) and Return YouTube Dislike (v4.0.4).
* OS PROCESS ALIGNMENT: Fixed Task Manager binary naming metadata and AppUserModelId registration to resolve the default 'Electron' label.
